THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACOME, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 255 WOODSIDE AVENUE #308 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94127 $517.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $517.50, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AND AGAINST DEFENDANT MICHAEL LACOME FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES KNOWN AS 255 WOODSIDE AVENUE #308, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94127; FOR FORFEITURE OF THE RENTAL AGREEMENT; AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $517.50

calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay ; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Tim Barrows.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Lacom is present.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Nov-13-2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
